title: RusmayARTs
description: Adds to the game a lot of paintings with different resolutions and sizes.
body:
Main

I present to your attention the third project of the GuildCraftsMens development team from their leader RusmayXD. This modification adds a total of 40 new paintings to the game.

For convenience, I will create a world and arrange all 40 paintings in order. The mod adds specific paintings to the game (available sizes (in blocks, length and width) of certain arts are written in brackets):

• 22 landscapes (14 paintings 4 by 4, 8 works 2 by 2).
• 9 paintings are dedicated to various works: films, anime, fairy tales, comics, movies, games and so on (4 art 2 by 2, 3 paintings 1 by 1, and 2 works 8 by 8).
• Another 3 paintings are dedicated to the developers themselves (one 4x4 and two 8x8).
• The remaining 6 works are all in one block (1 by 1). There is a huge variety of topics.


P.S. This mod was made with the support of MCreator. But I've learned a lot, maybe it's time to start playing?
